title: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North
meta_description: It's time to win together for Norwich North.
headings: h2: Keep an eye on the calendar for upcoming Constituency Surgeries.
h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Upcoming Events Keep an eye on the calendar for upcoming Constituency Surgeries. My constituency surgeries are open to all constituents of Norwich North who need support or assistance with issues in their daily lives. I am always here to listen. Please book a slot by calling 01603 733182 or emailing alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk To speak with me at my surgeries: please send an email to alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk providing your name, contact details, and preferred time slot. May 2026 May 27 27 May 6:00 pm - 7:30 pm Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery Find out more MY PROMISE TO YOU Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them. I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same. That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. As your MP, I will, Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job. Always listen to you – I hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible. Champion our great county and fine city – I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area. And I’ll always be honest with you – I won’t make promises I can’t keep. Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL.
